ques: Find news related to the storm in Weather section and indicate where and when the severe weather occurred.
answer: A storm hit the West of England — lightning thunderstorms struck Bristol, Somerset, Gloucestershire and Wiltshire under a yellow thunderstorm warning in place from 00:00 to 10:00 BST (overnight, around 26 June 2026), the second such storm in five days after storms battered the region on Monday.
